name: assetflow
description: AssetFlow — Smart Asset Management and Resource Allocation Platform

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,magenta "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix server && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run db:setup
